title: Navibrain
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''navibrain''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] based [[Biot]] shaped like a brain.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''
